scope: SPEC-0011 docs-audit closeout guardrails G1-G5; working-tree diff vs main on feat/change-0005-docs-audit-closeout-guardrails

findings.summary: gateDoc calls parseReviewBy without extraMethods; diverges from runAudit under review_by_methods config (false gate FAIL on custom combo/actor-method tokens under close_gate: enforce). Inert in this repo (empty review_by_methods).
findings.recommendation: Pass config.review_by_methods into parseReviewBy inside gateDoc.

findings.summary: G3 artifact corroboration uses substring name.includes(id) with no id boundary; loose against variable-width ids (\d{1,5}). Report-only; no live impact (repo ids uniformly 4-digit). Matches spec residual risk.
findings.recommendation: Optional: anchor the artifact match to an id boundary.

findings.summary: Real review files are timestamp-named (no doc id), so the G3 artifact-glob branch is effectively dead in this repo; G3 relies on events in practice. Consistent with spec residual risk.
